name: @finografic/design-system-workspace
description: Workspace root — see packages/ for publishable packages.

scripts.release.patch: pnpm build.all && git add packages/icons/dist packages/design-system/dist && pnpm --filter @finografic/icons exec -- pnpm version patch && pnpm --filter @finografic/design-system exec -- pnpm version patch && pnpm --filter @finografic/icons publish --no-git-checks --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com && pnpm --filter @finografic/design-system publish --no-git-checks --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release.minor: pnpm build.all && git add packages/icons/dist packages/design-system/dist && pnpm --filter @finografic/icons exec -- pnpm version minor && pnpm --filter @finografic/design-system exec -- pnpm version minor && pnpm --filter @finografic/icons publish --no-git-checks --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com && pnpm --filter @finografic/design-system publish --no-git-checks --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release.major: pnpm build.all && git add packages/icons/dist packages/design-system/dist && pnpm --filter @finografic/icons exec -- pnpm version major && pnpm --filter @finografic/design-system exec -- pnpm version major && pnpm --filter @finografic/icons publish --no-git-checks --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com && pnpm --filter @finografic/design-system publish --no-git-checks --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com && git push --follow-tags
